headline: How working with Travis Kelce's coach ignited Seydou Traore's NFL dream
description: While many of the NFL's International Player Pathway Program (IPPP) players have entered the program with little to no knowledge of American football, Seydou 'Ziko' Traore is as league-ready as a prospect from London could be.

headline: Buccaneers take Rueben Bain Jr. with 15th pick in NFL draft
description: The Buccaneers selected Rueben Bain Jr. with the 15th pick in the NFL draft, less than two weeks after news surfaced that the ex-Miami star was involved in a motor vehicle accident that resulted in the death of a passenger in 2024.
